title: [InstCombine] Convert fshl(x, 0, y) to shl(x, and(y, BitWidth - 1)) when BitWidth is pow2

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.fshl.i32(i32, i32, i32) #0

define i32 @fshl_zero_from_sub_computation(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %zero = sub i32 %z, %z
  %res = call i32 @llvm.fshl.i32(i32 %x, i32 %zero, i32 %y)
  ret i32 %res
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes matching literal zeros and zeroinitializer, but does not cover zeros produced by computations (like sub %z, %z) that InstCombine can recognize via m_ZeroInt()

declare i32 @llvm.fshl.i32(i32, i32, i32) #0

define i32 @fshl_zero_from_sub_computation(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %zero = sub i32 %z, %z
  %res = call i32 @llvm.fshl.i32(i32 %x, i32 %zero, i32 %y)
  ret i32 %res
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.fshl.i32(i32, i32, i32) #0

define i32 @fshl_zero_from_sub_computation(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %0 = and i32 %y, 31
  %res = shl i32 %x, %0
  ret i32 %res
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i32 @fshl_zero_from_sub_computation(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %zero = sub i32 %z, %z
  %res = fshl i32 %x, i32 %zero, i32 %y
  ret i32 %res
}
=>
define i32 @fshl_zero_from_sub_computation(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %#0 = and i32 %y, 31
  %res = shl i32 %x, %#0
  ret i32 %res
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
